/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/aircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/aircraft_msgs/msg/aircraft_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/aircraft_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
